title: Build Grok routing for congress personas

log.context: Build Grok routing for congress personas

The temporal worker is running. Since `congress_debate` routes through the HTTP API (serve.py), no restart is needed for the worker — the Grok routing lives in serve.py which runs as `website.service`. The website service doesn't need a restart either since serve.py reads the persona files at request time (the model field is read from the YAML frontmatter on each call to `_load_identity`).
